Sat.
Yen. Jupt. com and Aquarius. Then there is Mars
Mer. Db. having the aspect of Jupiter in Virgo.
So, the father will own a house and will have some landed property (Mars).
Jupiter's aspect made the parent rich and highly judicious in temperament.
Mars having Ketu in the third to him, indicates that the native will have
a brother who will be highly devptional and philanthropic in nature going to
foreign countries and,earning well. He will hold a high post.

IMPORTANT CHARTS 261
The native will not be married till 28. When Jupiter leaves Taurus and
enters Gemini, he gets the aspect of Venus and so marriage may take place
between 28-30. This will happen when the native will be away from native
place. Mercury and Jupiter having exchanged places, Jupiter by the law of
exchange gets the contact ofVenus. As a result the native will live happily
up to 58 years.
CHART 398
The parent (the Sun) is one who
will be a trader (Mercury) and will Dt Mars I
